issue_summary: Changed explain method to use TermDocs.skipTo instead of looping.
javadoc_before:
/** Returns an explanation of the score for a document. *
When this method is used, the {@link #next()} method * and the {@link #score(HitCollector)} method should not be used. * @param doc The document number for the explanation. * @todo Modify to make use of {@link TermDocs#skipTo(int)}. */
javadoc_after:
/** Returns an explanation of the score for a document. *
When this method is used, the {@link #next()} method * and the {@link #score(HitCollector)} method should not be used. * @param doc The document number for the explanation. */
